Cymek is a RAG pipeline platform that transforms your documents into an intelligent knowledge base. It ingests PDFs, text files, and web pages, chunks them intelligently, generates embeddings, and provides a chat interface for querying your data.

Key features:
- Document ingestion (PDF, TXT, DOCX, URL)
- Intelligent chunking and embedding
- AI-powered question answering
- Pipeline status tracking via SSE
- Embeddable chat widget
